name: ASDelivery
brief_description: Reactive effect delivery node for projectiles and payloads.
description:
[ASDelivery] is a specialized node designed to carry and deliver [ASPackage]s to [ASComponent] targets.
		Unlike [ASComponent], which acts as a full ability system hub for an actor, [ASDelivery] is a lightweight utility that can be attached to any node (like a projectile's Area2D) to inject effects upon impact.

properties.name: auto_connect
properties.description: If true, attempts to connect automatically to [Area2D] or [Area3D] signals in the parent node.

properties.name: level
properties.description: The magnitude or strength level of the delivery. This gets injected into all effects spawned by the delivery.

properties.name: life_span
properties.description: Maximum duration the delivery stays active (0 = infinite).

properties.name: one_shot
properties.description: If true, the delivery deactivates automatically after the first successful delivery.

properties.name: package
properties.description: The [ASPackage] payload containing effects and cues.

properties.name: source_component
properties.description: The [ASComponent] that initiated this delivery (e.g., the original attacker).

properties.name: target_groups
properties.description: List of groups that targets must belong to for delivery to occur.

methods.name: activate
methods.description: Activates the delivery. If [param duration] is positive, it overrides [member life_span].

methods.name: can_deliver_to
methods.description: Checks if the delivery can reach the specified target (checks groups and validity).

methods.name: deliver
methods.description: Delivers the payload of an [ASPackage] to the target component. Automatically dispatches ASEventTags defined in the package upon successful delivery.

methods.name: is_delivery_valid
methods.description: Returns true if the delivery is active and hasn't expired.

signals.name: delivered
signals.description: Emitted when a package is successfully delivered to a target.

signals.name: expired
signals.description: Emitted when the life_span timer reaches zero.
